elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65, ระดับหลังเสาล่าง +6.95, ระดับหลังเสาบน +8.05 -- same level chain as รูปตัด 1 (หน้า13)

elements.grid_ref: near grid2, upper floor, box '2 +3.75 1', wall height 2.60

elements.description: This room cut clearly shows the ST3 main staircase in section, with a visible handrail line and steps rising from ground floor to upper floor between grid2 and grid4 -- the clearest single-sheet depiction of this stair's actual rise/run geometry in this extraction pass so far.

elements.grid_ref: near grid1-2, ground floor, box '1 +0.60 1', wall heights 2.70 (both sides of a window bay)

elements.description: Bottom dimension chain: 0.70+0.60 (west overhang, bracket 1.30) | 4.00 (grid1-2) | 2.00 (grid2-3) | 3.00 (grid3-4) | 0.50+0.80 (east overhang, bracket 1.30), overall bracket '9.00' (grid1-grid4)

warnings: This building cross-section (รูปตัด 2) cuts along the width direction (parallel to grid1-2-3-4), through ห้องน้ำ2/นอน1/โถง (with the main stair fully visible in profile) on the upper floor, and ทานอาหาร/เก็บของ on the ground floor.
Sibling section รูปตัด 1 is in _หน้า13_section1.json. This house has only 2 sections total (A-11, A-12).

The stair shown here in profile (rising from ground floor +0.60 to upper floor +3.75, with a visible handrail) is the ST3 main stair -- this is the clearest cross-sectional view of its actual geometry found in this extraction pass, useful for corroborating the step-count/rise-run details noted on the floor plans (หน้า06/07) and to be detailed further on sheet A-20 (ST.3, หน้า22 per this house's index).
Level chain (+8.05/+6.95/+6.65 roof-post levels) matches รูปตัด 1 exactly -- cross-consistent within this sheet pair.
Bottom dimension chain (0.70+0.60 | 4.00 | 2.00 | 3.00 | 0.50+0.80, bracket 1.30|9.00|1.30) matches รูปด้าน 1's (หน้า09) equivalent chain exactly -- both are views along the same grid1-4 width axis.
No dummy-grid-relevant feature applies to this sheet (it cuts along the 1-2-3-4 axis, not the F-E-D-C-B-A axis where the ST1/Aprime dummy grid sits).
